memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Leaderboard

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Leaderboard

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &LeaderboardCode, EAccelByteLeaderboardTimeFrame const &TimeFrame, uint32 Offset, uint32 Limit, THandler< FAccelByteModelsLeaderboardRankingResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetRankings

briefdescription.para: Get leaderboard rankings in a specified timeframe.

parameterdescription.para: Specify leaderboard code to get from the leaderboard.
Specify the time frame of leaderboard.
Starting index of leaderboard rank. First index is 0.
Ranking displayed for each page.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsLeaderboardRankingResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &LeaderboardCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserRankingData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserRanking

parameterdescription.para: Specify user ID to get from the leaderboard ranking list.
Specify leaderboard code to get from the leaderboard.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsUserRankingData.
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32 Offset, uint32 Limit, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedLeaderboardData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLeaderboards

briefdescription.para: List all leaderboards in the current namespace.

parameterdescription.para: The offset of leaderboard data result
The limit of leaderboard data result
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsPaginatedLeaderboardData
This will be called when the operation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &LeaderboardCode, FString const &CycleId, uint32 Offset, uint32 Limit, THandler< FAccelByteModelsLeaderboardRankingResultV3 > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetRankingByCycle

briefdescription.para: Get the list of user ranking data in a leaderboard in a specific cycle.

parameterdescription.para: The offset of leaderboard data result
The limit of leaderboard data result
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsLeaderboardRankingResultV3
This will be called when the operation failed

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedLeaderboardData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, uint32 Limit=20, uint32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetLeaderboardsV3

briefdescription.para: List all leaderboards in the current namespace.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsPaginatedLeaderboardData
This will be called when the operation failed.
The limit of leaderboard data result
The offset of leaderboard data result

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &LeaderboardCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsBaseLeaderboardData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetLeaderboardV3

briefdescription.para: Retrieve Leaderboard data for specific LeaderboardCode.

parameterdescription.para: specified Leaderboard code to query
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsPaginatedLeaderboardData
This will be called when the operation failed.

briefdescription.para: Get the list of all time user ranking data in a leaderboard.

parameterdescription.para: The leaderboard code
The offset of leaderboard data result
The limit of leaderboard data result
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsLeaderboardRankingResultV3
This will be called when the operation failed

briefdescription.para: Get all time and cycles user ranking data in a leaderboard.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsUserRankingDataV3
This will be called when the operation failed

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &UserIds, FString const &LeaderboardCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsBulkUserRankingDataV3 > OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetBulkUserRankingV3

briefdescription.para: Retrieve bulk user ranking data for all time periods and cycles in a leaderboard.

parameterdescription.para: List of UserIds.
The leaderboard code
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsBulkUserRankingDataV3
This will be called when the operation failed

briefdescription.para: Leaderboard API to obtain player's ranking in a namespace.
